identity.name: RegimeAdaptiveMomentumAgent
identity.description: Autonomous regime-adaptive momentum agent: reads CoinMarketCap (price, Fear & Greed) to score market regime and rank momentum. It PAYS for data and GETS PAID for its CMC Regime Report over x402 (USDC, EIP-3009 on Avalanche C-Chain), and holds an ERC-8004 on-chain identity it heartbeats each cycle. Risk-first. Trades from wallet 0xE8A30d24BbA030D3e8a844bD1c4F6e1374EA6215 (TWAK-signed).

strategy.name: momentum_cmc
strategy.summary: CMC-driven momentum: hold top-5 of 8 by 120-bar (20d) return on CoinMarketCap's own 4h candles (inverse-vol, regime-adaptive cap), confirmed live by CMC technical-analysis + Fear&Greed. The entire decision runs on CMC data.

items.name: AVAX_STRATEGY_01
items.summary: AVAX_STRATEGY_01 (alias of momentum_adaptive) — Regime-adaptive momentum: hold top-2 of 8 by 120-bar return, inverse-vol; deployment scales with a live risk-on score (breadth + trend + vol + Fear&Greed).

items.name: AVAX_STRATEGY_02
items.summary: AVAX_STRATEGY_02 (alias of momentum_voltarget) — Regime-adaptive momentum: hold top-2 of 8 by 120-bar return, inverse-vol; deployment scales with a live risk-on score (breadth + trend + vol + Fear&Greed). | overlay: vol-target 1.2%/bar (de-risk only)

items.name: AVAX_STRATEGY_03
items.summary: AVAX_STRATEGY_03 (alias of dual_momentum) — Dual momentum: hold top-2 of 8 by 120-bar return with a positive-momentum cash filter; rotate FULLY to USDT when the basket itself is down over 120 bars. Long-only risk-off.

items.name: AVAX_STRATEGY_04
items.summary: AVAX_STRATEGY_04 (alias of rotation) — Relative-strength rotation: hold top-3 of 8 by a blended 120+60-bar momentum z-score, inverse-vol, regime-capped (no cash filter).

items.name: AVAX_STRATEGY_05
items.summary: AVAX_STRATEGY_05 (alias of breakout) — Volatility breakout: hold the 8-token names that break their 20-bar high (exit on the 5-bar low), inverse-vol, regime-capped. Asymmetric exit channel replaces the AMM stop.

items.name: AVAX_STRATEGY_06
items.summary: AVAX_STRATEGY_06 (alias of momentum_fast) — Short-horizon momentum: hold top-2 of 8 by 60-bar (~10d) return, rebalanced every 3 bars (12h); regime-adaptive deployment. Faster/reactive variant.

items.name: AVAX_STRATEGY_07
items.summary: AVAX_STRATEGY_07 (alias of momentum_mafilter) — Regime-adaptive momentum: hold top-2 of 8 by 120-bar return, inverse-vol; deployment scales with a live risk-on score (breadth + trend + vol + Fear&Greed). | overlay: MA(50) trend filter

items.name: AVAX_STRATEGY_08
items.summary: AVAX_STRATEGY_08 (alias of mean_reversion) — Mean-reversion: buy 8-token names trading >1.0σ below their 20-bar mean, inverse-vol, regime-capped. Forward-gated capability arm with an adverse prior (reversal flips to momentum on majors) — promote with extra skepticism.

items.name: AVAX_STRATEGY_09
items.summary: AVAX_STRATEGY_09 (alias of grid) — Grid / range: hold MORE of each of the 8 tokens the lower it sits in its 50-bar range (buy dips), less the higher; flatten on a breakdown below the range (hard stop). Inverse-vol, regime-capped. Net-inventory model — no resting orders.

items.name: breakout
items.summary: Volatility breakout: hold the 8-token names that break their 20-bar high (exit on the 5-bar low), inverse-vol, regime-capped. Asymmetric exit channel replaces the AMM stop.

items.name: momentum
items.summary: Static momentum: hold top-2 of 8 by 120-bar return, inverse-vol, capped at 60%.

items.rationale: CMC daily-replay on the Avalanche universe: risk-on score 0.00 (extreme fear) → deploying 35% of book (11% LINK, 9% ETH, 7% SOL, 5% AAVE, 3% UNI, inverse-vol weighted), 65% in USDT. Long-only spot momentum; participation over a bear-dominated tape.
